homepageDossier.name: Amit Rana
homepageDossier.blurb: I work end to end: the app, the AI, and the tooling that holds it together. I keep a tight client list so each project gets senior attention from scope to handoff. No juniors, no coordination tax.

intro.headline: Five years of shipping.
intro.subhead: I'm Amit Rana, a senior product engineer who turns stuck roadmaps into shipped product, end to end.

paragraphs: For five years I've worked across the full arc of product engineering: the app, the AI, and the tooling that holds it together. Most of that breadth was earned shipping under real deadlines, not collecting certifications.

I started as a frontend engineer obsessed with craft and performance, moved deep into full-stack and infrastructure as products I built started to scale, and spent the last few years building production AI features back when "just call the API" still broke in a dozen quiet ways.

Today I work as a fractional senior engineer for funded early-stage teams. I keep a deliberately small client list, so every project gets senior attention from scope to handoff. No juniors quietly learning on your budget, no coordination tax.

values.title: Outcomes over output
values.description: I scope to the metric you're trying to move, not the feature list.

values.title: Build in the open
values.description: Weekly demos and a direct line. You always know where things stand.

values.title: Senior, end to end
values.description: The person who scopes it is the person who ships it.

values.title: No lock-in
values.description: Tested, documented, and handed back. The code is yours.

inTheOpen.name: Hookpilot
inTheOpen.description: An open-source Git hook manager that makes the right checks automatic before a commit ever reaches CI. Now 50k+ weekly downloads on npm.

cta.heading: Let's build the thing your roadmap is stuck on.
cta.subhead: Free 20-minute intro call. I reply within 1 business day.
